UNH Forecast, Price Target & Analyst Ratings
UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
Wall Street Piles Into UnitedHealth: Argus Upgrades to Buy as Three More Firms Raise Targets After Q1 Crushes Expectations
Watch the Valuation: Top Deutsche Bank Analyst Downgrades UnitedHealth Stock (UNH) despite Q3 Beat

summary_extracted: Consensus Buy from 24-25 analysts as of late April 2026 (18 buy, 5 hold, 0 sell per TipRanks). Argus upgraded to Buy after Q1 beat (April 22, 2026). Raymond James raised PT to $330 (April 1, 2026). TD Cowen, Piper Sandler, Truist, BofA, Morgan Stanley (Top Pick), HSBC all raised targets post-Q1. Deutsche Bank downgraded to Hold earlier on valuation (PT $333).
